docs.title: 謝家康
docs.text: HSIEH, CHIA-KANG

docs.title: 關於我
docs.text: 具備建築設計與程式設計的知識與應用能力。我熟悉Python的語法及概念(OOP, Data Structure, Time Complexity等)，並且對於 ML / DL 的模型理論及運作原理都有一定程度的理解(RL, CNN, RNN, Transformer等)。目前，也利用這些知識親自實作過許多不同大小的專案，並且替公司客戶的資料庫資料進行 ETL 跟語意轉換以及軟體開發的業務。在團隊中，因為我具有跨領域的背景，因此能以非傳統資訊訓練的思維及溝通方式，幫助資訊團隊與其他合作專案部門溝通及協調問題，並將複雜資料轉換為可理解、可決策的形式。在個人能力上，具備資料處理、ETL 流程設計、API設計的經驗。

• 建築與程式設計跨領域背景

  • 擅長資料處理、ETL 流程設計與API設計

docs.title: Medical Examination ETL Pipeline
docs.text:
• 類型：資料工程（Data Engineering）
  • 內容：將半結構化 JSON 醫檢資料轉換為乾淨、結構化的資料與階層式文字輸出
  • 流程：資料展開 → 清洗與正規化 → 群組與層級重組 → 輸出
  • 延伸：可選擇性整合 LLM，將結構化結果轉為可讀摘要文字
  • 技術：Python、pandas、FastAPI、MongoDB（pymongo）、LLM API（可 mock）
  • GitHub：https://github.com/okami518/medical_examination_ETL

docs.title: Boston Housing Price Prediction (Kaggle Competition)
docs.text:
• 類型：回歸問題（Regression）
  • 內容：以 Boston Housing 資料集預測房價中位數（medv），並參與課程 Kaggle 競賽
  • 方法：結合 Ridge Regression、SVR 與 XGBoost，透過加權 voting 進行集成
  • 重點：自行切分 validation set，以 RMSE 作為模型選擇依據
  • 技術：Python、pandas、scikit-learn、xgboost
  • GitHub：https://github.com/okami518/Boston-Housing-Competition

docs.title: Public Construction Award Contractor List Generator
docs.text:
• 類型：文件自動化 / 資料處理
  • 內容：解析公共工程金質獎得獎名單 PDF，自動篩選建築類優良營造廠
  • 輸出：產生 .txt 清單，支援低碳與綠建築評分作業
  • 重點：降低人工整理名單的時間成本
  • 技術：Python、pdfplumber、tkinter
  • GitHub：https://github.com/okami518/construction_enterprise_list_generator

docs.title: stanCode Python Practice Projects
docs.text:
• 類型：課程專案 / 基礎能力訓練
  • 內容：涵蓋 Python 基礎語法、資料結構、OOP 與簡易資料視覺化
  • 實作：遊戲（Breakout）、資料視覺化、字串與影像處理、小型演算法題
  • 目的：培養程式結構設計與問題拆解能力
  • 技術：Python、campy、tkinter
  • GitHub：https://github.com/okami518/stanCode_Projects

docs.title: About Me
docs.text: I have a cross-disciplinary background in architecture and programming knowledge, along with practical application capabilities. I am familiar with Python syntax and concepts (OOP, Data Structure, Time Complexity, etc.),and I have a solid understanding of the theoretical foundations and operational principles of ML / DL models (RL, CNN, RNN, Transformer, etc.).Currently, I have applied this knowledge to personally implement numerous projects of varying scales, and have been responsible for performing ETL, semantic transformation, and software development on company clients’ database data. Within a team setting, due to my interdisciplinary background, I am able to adopt non-traditional, non–computer-science-trained ways of thinking and communication,to assist communication and coordination between technical teams and other collaborating project departments,and to transform complex data into forms that are understandable and actionable for decision-making. On a personal skill level, I have experience in data processing, ETL pipeline design, and API design.

docs.title: Medical Examination ETL Pipeline
docs.text:
• Type: Data Engineering
  • Description: End-to-end pipeline that transforms semi-structured JSON medical examination data into clean, structured outputs.
  • Pipeline: JSON expansion → data cleaning & normalization → hierarchical restructuring → output generation.
  • Extension: Optional LLM integration for structured-to-text summarization.
  • Tech Stack: Python, pandas, FastAPI, MongoDB (pymongo), LLM API (optional)
  • GitHub：https://github.com/okami518/medical_examination_ETL

docs.title: Boston Housing Price Prediction (Kaggle Competition)
docs.text:
• Type: Regression / Machine Learning
  • Description: Predict median house prices using the Boston Housing dataset as part of a course Kaggle competition.
  • Method: Ensemble regression with Ridge Regression, SVR, and XGBoost using weighted voting.
  • Key Point: Manual train/validation split with RMSE-based model selection.
  • Tech Stack: Python, pandas, scikit-learn, xgboost
  • GitHub：https://github.com/okami518/Boston-Housing-Competition

docs.title: Public Construction Award Contractor List Generator
docs.text:
• Type: Document Automation / Data Processing
  • Description: Automatically extracts award-winning construction contractors from official PDF documents.
  • Output: Generates .txt contractor lists to support low-carbon and green building evaluation workflows.
  • Focus: Reducing manual document processing effort.
  • Tech Stack: Python, pdfplumber, tkinter
  • GitHub：https://github.com/okami518/construction_enterprise_list_generator

docs.title: stanCode Python Practice Projects
docs.text:
• Type: Coursework / Programming Fundamentals
  • Description: A collection of practice projects covering Python syntax, data structures, OOP, and basic visualization.
  • Examples: Breakout game, data visualization, string processing, image manipulation.
  • Purpose: Strengthening problem decomposition and code structure skills.
  • Tech Stack: Python, campy, tkinter
  • GitHub：https://github.com/okami518/stanCode_Projects
